observed_progress: GenerateLayers started with resolution=512 and steps=8

failure.message: MPSNDArraySort failed assertion: Axis = 4. This class only supports axis = 0, 1, 2, 3

decision: Pre-patch 512 smoke did not produce *_layers.json. This was not a pure memory failure; it needed an MPS compatibility patch around augmented VAE median/sort.
next_patch_candidates: If result has only one augmentation tensor, return result[0] instead of torch.median.
Move torch.median(result, dim=0) to CPU, then move the median tensor back to the original device.
Disable augmented median path on MPS for the first smoke run.
Retry mps_512_safe after patch before attempting 640 or 768.
